flashcards.definition: Total income from sales before any expenses are deducted (also called gross sales or top line).
Direct costs of producing the goods/services sold: materials, direct labor, manufacturing overhead.
Revenue minus COGS; shows profitability of core product/service before overhead.
Final profit after ALL expenses, including operating costs, interest, and taxes.
Net profit ÷ Revenue × 100; shows what percentage of each revenue dollar becomes profit.
